Who We Are

Demolition Done Right in San Jose

Emerson Enterprise started with a simple mission: to provide top-quality demolition services with integrity and a commitment to safety. Founded by a San Jose native, we understand the unique challenges of demolition in this area, from navigating the tight spaces of Willow Glen to addressing the specific needs of older homes in the Rose Garden neighborhood.

Our approach is straightforward. We assess each project meticulously, develop a clear plan, and execute it with skill and precision. We value clear communication, respect for your property, and a dedication to leaving the site clean and ready for the next phase. We're not just tearing down structures; we're building trust with every job.

As a local business, we're invested in the San Jose community. We prioritize responsible disposal and recycling practices, minimizing our environmental impact. We also actively support local initiatives, believing in giving back to the neighborhoods we serve.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Emerson Enterprise

Safety First

Unwavering commitment to safety protocols, protecting our team and your property.

Experienced Professionals

Decades of combined experience in all types of demolition projects.

Efficient Execution

We complete projects on time and within budget, minimizing disruption.

Environmental Responsibility

Prioritizing recycling and responsible disposal to minimize our impact.

Ready to Demolish Your Project?

Contact Emerson Enterprise today for a free consultation and estimate. Let's get started!

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Emerson Enterprise demolished an old shed in my backyard. They were incredibly efficient and professional. The team took great care to protect my existing landscaping and left the site spotless. Highly recommend!

Maria S. Residential Demolition
“

Needed an old concrete patio removed. Emerson Enterprise gave me a fair quote and completed the job quickly. There was a minor issue with dust, but they addressed it immediately. Overall, very satisfied.

David K. Concrete Removal
“

We hired Emerson Enterprise for selective demolition during our kitchen remodel. They carefully removed a load-bearing wall without any issues. The team was respectful of our home and cleaned up thoroughly afterward. We were impressed with their expertise.

Linda J. Selective Demolition
“

Emerson Enterprise handled the demolition of a small office building we purchased. They managed the project efficiently and safely, even with some unexpected challenges. Communication was excellent throughout the process.

Robert P. Commercial Demolition
“

We had asbestos siding that needed removal prior to a remodel. Emerson Enterprise handled the job with professionalism and care. They explained the process clearly and followed all safety protocols. A bit pricey, but worth it for the peace of mind.

Susan L. Asbestos Abatement
“

Emerson Enterprise cleared a lot for me in preparation for building a new home. They removed trees, brush, and old structures quickly and efficiently. The site was left clean and ready for construction. Great job!

Michael B. Site Clearing

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a permit for residential demolition?
Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for residential demolition in San Jose. We handle the permit application process for you, ensuring compliance with all local regulations.
How long does residential demolition take?
The duration of a residential demolition project depends on the size and complexity of the structure. We provide a realistic timeline during the initial consultation.
What happens to the debris after demolition?
We prioritize responsible disposal and recycling. We sort the debris and transport it to licensed recycling facilities whenever possible.
